verses.text: Mihai in a lungsim sungah, “Pasian omlo hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Amaute sia uh hi. A kihhuai-in gamta uh a, a hoihin a gamta kuamah omlo hi
A pil, Pasian a zong mi a om uh hiam, cih a theihna dingin Pasian in vantung panin mihingte hong ensuk hi
Amaute khempeuh a vekpi-un pukkhin uh hi. A kibangin kisia kim uh a, a hoihin a gamta khat beek omlo hi
Pasian tungah thu a ngenlo, an nek bangin ka mite a netum, siatna a bawlte in thu theihtelna neilo ahi hiam

Cikmahin tua bang launa a om ngeilo, launa lianpi sungah amaute om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in migilote' guhte thehthang ding hi. Pasian in amaute nial ahih manin, amaute maizumin kikoih ding hi
Zion panin Israel-te-a' ding hotkhiatna hong tun'na ding thu ka ngenngen hi. Pasian in ama mite tungah nopsakna a piakkik ciangin, ama mi Israel-te kipak mahmah ding uh hi.
